rulings.Case Title: CHEVY'S ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. WARREN L. SIMMONS JR et al

rulings.Case Title: MARIE BACHAND VS. NANCY DE STEFANIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 28, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT NANCY DE STEFANIS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant, subject to opposition. Post and mail request contains inconsistent names. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: J. MICHAEL STEELE VS. SAM NAIFEH MD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 28, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SAM NAIFEH, M.D's Motion To Quash Service. Deny, untimely failed to comply with CCP 1167.4 and defendnat's counsel should comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
